clues: A user trying to access the company's web portal is redirected back to the login page repeatedly.
The user enters correct credentials but the login page just refreshes without any error message.
The portal works fine for colleagues using the same web browser version.
Clearing browser cookies and cache temporarily resolves the issue for a few minutes.
The user's account is configured to require re-authentication due to a recent security policy change.
